Adaptation Technology.name: Adaptation Technology
Adaptation Technology.description: Global requirements Effect: Your global requirements are +2 or -2 steps, your choice in each case.

Advanced Ecosystems.name: Advanced Ecosystems
Advanced Ecosystems.requirements: 1 Plant tag / 1 Animal tag / 1 Microbe tag
Advanced Ecosystems.description: Requires a plant tag, a microbe tag, and an animal tag.
Advanced Ecosystems.description_ru: Необходим символ растений, символ бактерий и символ животных.

Aerobraked Ammonia Asteroid.name: Aerobraked Ammonia Asteroid
Aerobraked Ammonia Asteroid.description: Increase your heat production 3 steps and your plant production 1 step. Add 2 microbes to ANOTHER card.
Aerobraked Ammonia Asteroid.description_ru: Положите 2 жетона бактерий на другую карту. Повысьте своё производство тепла на 3 и производство растений на 1.

Aquifer Pumping.name: Aquifer Pumping
Aquifer Pumping.description: megacredits Action: Spend 8 M€ to place 1 ocean tile. STEEL MAY BE USED as if you were playing a building card.

Algae.name: Algae
Algae.description: Requires 5 ocean tiles. Gain 1 plant and increase your plant production 2 steps.
Algae.description_ru: Необходимо 5 тайлов океана. Получите 1 растение и повысьте своё производство растений на 2.

ArchaeBacteria.name: ArchaeBacteria
ArchaeBacteria.description: It must be -18 C or colder. Increase your plant production 1 step.
ArchaeBacteria.description_ru: Температура должна быть -18 градусов или ниже. Повысьте своё производство растений на 1.

Arctic Algae.name: Arctic Algae
Arctic Algae.description: It must be -12 C or colder to play. Gain 1 plant.
Arctic Algae.description_ru: Температура должна быть -12 градусов или ниже. Получите 1 растение.

Artificial Lake.name: Artificial Lake
Artificial Lake.description: Requires -6 C or warmer. Place 1 ocean tile ON AN AREA NOT RESERVED FOR OCEAN.
Artificial Lake.description_ru: Температура должна быть -6 градусов или выше. Выложите тайл океана на участок, не зарезервированный для океана.

Artificial Photosynthesis.name: Artificial Photosynthesis
Artificial Photosynthesis.description: Increase your plant production 1 step or your energy production 2 steps.
Artificial Photosynthesis.description_ru: Повысьте своё производство растений на 1 или своё производство энергии на 2.

Asteroid.name: Asteroid
Asteroid.description: Raise temperature 1 step and gain 2 titanium. Remove up to 3 plants from any player.
Asteroid.description_ru: Повысьте температуру на 1 и получите 2 титана. Удалите до 3 растений у любого игрока.

Beam From A Thorium Asteroid.name: Beam From A Thorium Asteroid
Beam From A Thorium Asteroid.description: Requires a Jovian tag. Increase your heat production and energy production 3 steps each.
Beam From A Thorium Asteroid.description_ru: Необходим символ Юпитера. Повысьте своё производство тепла и своё производство энергии на 3.

Big Asteroid.name: Big Asteroid
Big Asteroid.description: Raise temperature 2 steps and gain 4 titanium. Remove up to 4 plants from any player.
Big Asteroid.description_ru: Повысьте температуру на 2 и получите 4 титана. Удалите до 4 растений у любого игрока.

Biomass Combustors.name: Biomass Combustors
Biomass Combustors.description: Requires 6% oxygen. Decrease any plant production 1 step and increase your energy production 2 steps.
Biomass Combustors.description_ru: Уровень кислорода должен быть 6%. Снизьте производство растений у любого игрока на 1 и повысьте своё производство энергии на 2.

Birds.name: Birds
Birds.description: Requires 13% oxygen. Decrease any plant production 2 steps. 1 VP per animal on this card.
Birds.description_ru: Уровень кислорода должен быть 13%. Снизьте у любого игрока производство растений на 2. 1 ПО за каждый жетон животных на этой карте.

Black Polar Dust.name: Black Polar Dust
Black Polar Dust.description: Place an ocean tile. Decrease your M€ production 2 steps and increase your heat production 3 steps.
Black Polar Dust.description_ru: Выложите тайл океана. Снизьте свой доход на 2 и повысьте своё производство тепла на 3.

Bushes.name: Bushes
Bushes.description: Requires -10 C or warmer. Increase your plant production 2 steps. Gain 2 plants.
Bushes.description_ru: Температура должна быть -10 градусов или выше. Повысьте своё производство растений на 2 и получите 2 растения.

description.text: Requires 4 ocean tiles. Place this tile. Decrease your energy production 2 steps and increase your M€ production 5 steps.

Carbonate Processing.name: Carbonate Processing
Carbonate Processing.description: Decrease your energy production 1 step and increase your heat production 3 steps.
Carbonate Processing.description_ru: Снизьте своё производство энергии на 1 и повысьте своё производство тепла на 3.

Cloud Seeding.name: Cloud Seeding
Cloud Seeding.description: Requires 3 ocean tiles. Decrease your M€ production 1 step and any heat production 1 step. Increase your plant production 2 steps.
Cloud Seeding.description_ru: Необходимо 3 тайла океана. Снизьте свой доход на 1 и производство тепла любого игрока на 1. Повысьте своё производство растений на 2.

Colonizer Training Camp.name: Colonizer Training Camp
Colonizer Training Camp.description_ru: Уровень кислорода должен быть 5% или ниже.

Comet.name: Comet
Comet.description: Raise temperature 1 step and place an ocean tile. Remove up to 3 plants from any player.
Comet.description_ru: Повысьте температуру на 1 и выложите тайл океана. Удалите до 3 растений у любого игрока.

Convoy From Europa.name: Convoy From Europa
Convoy From Europa.description: Place 1 ocean tile and draw 1 card.
Convoy From Europa.description_ru: Выложите 1 тайл океана и возьмите 1 карту.

Cupola City.name: Cupola City
Cupola City.description: Oxygen must be 9% or less. Place a city tile. Decrease your energy production 1 step and increase your M€ production 3 steps.
Cupola City.description_ru: Уровень кислорода должен быть 9% или ниже. Постройте город. Снизьте своё производство энергии на 1 и повысьте свой доход на 3.

Deep Well Heating.name: Deep Well Heating
Deep Well Heating.description: Increase your energy production 1 step. Increase temperature 1 step.
Deep Well Heating.description_ru: Повысьте своё производство энергии на 1. Повысьте температуру на 1.

Deimos Down.name: Deimos Down
Deimos Down.description: Raise temperature 3 steps and gain 4 steel. Remove up to 8 plants from any player.
Deimos Down.description_ru: Повысьте температуру на 3 и получите 4 стали. Удалите до 8 растений у любого игрока.

Designed Microorganisms.name: Designed Microorganisms
Designed Microorganisms.description: It must be -14 C or colder. Increase your plant production 2 steps.
Designed Microorganisms.description_ru: Температура должна быть -14 или ниже. Повысьте своё производство растений на 2.

description.text: Oxygen must be 7% or less. Gain 3 plants. Place a city tile. Decrease your energy production 1 step and increase your M€ production 3 steps.
Requires that YOU have a greenery tile. Place this tile adjacent to ANY greenery.

Energy Saving.name: Energy Saving
Energy Saving.description: Increase your energy production 1 step for each city tile in play.
Energy Saving.description_ru: Повысьте своё производство энергии на 1 за каждый город в игре.

Eos Chasma National Park.name: Eos Chasma National Park
Eos Chasma National Park.description: Requires -12 C or warmer. Add 1 animal TO ANY ANIMAL CARD. Gain 3 plants. Increase your M€ production 2 steps.
Eos Chasma National Park.description_ru: Температура должна быть -12 градусов или выше. Положите 1 жетон животных на любую карту с символом животных. Получите 3 растения. Повысьте свой доход на 2.

Equatorial Magnetizer.name: Equatorial Magnetizer
Equatorial Magnetizer.description: production-box Action: Decrease your energy production 1 step to increase your terraform rating 1 step.

Extreme-Cold Fungus.name: Extreme-Cold Fungus
Extreme-Cold Fungus.description: It must be -10 C or colder.
Extreme-Cold Fungus.description_ru: Температура должна быть -10 градусов или ниже.

Farming.name: Farming
Farming.description: Requires +4° C or warmer. Increase your M€ production 2 steps and your plant production 2 steps. Gain 2 plants.
Farming.description_ru: Температура должна быть +4 градуса или выше. Повысьте свой доход на 2 и своё производство растений на 2. Получите 2 растения.

description.text: Requires +2 C° or warmer. Decrease any plant production 1 step.

Flooding.name: Flooding
Flooding.description: Place an ocean tile. IF THERE ARE TILES ADJACENT TO THIS OCEAN TILE, YOU MAY REMOVE 4 M€ FROM THE OWNER OF ONE OF THOSE TILES.
Flooding.description_ru: Выложите тайл океана. Если рядом с этим тайлом есть другие тайлы, вы можете удалить 4M€ у владельца одного из тайлов.

Food Factory.name: Food Factory
Food Factory.description: Decrease your plant production 1 step and increase your M€ production 4 steps.
Food Factory.description_ru: Снизьте своё производство растений на 1 и повысьте свой доход на 4.

Fusion Power.name: Fusion Power
Fusion Power.description: Requires 2 power tags. Increase your energy production 3 steps.
Fusion Power.description_ru: Необходимо 2 символа энергии. Повысьте своё производство энергии на 3.

Fueled Generators.name: Fueled Generators
Fueled Generators.description: Decrease your M€ production 1 step and increase your energy production 1 steps.
Fueled Generators.description_ru: Снизьте свой доход на 1 и повысьте производство энергии на 1.

Ganymede Colony.name: Ganymede Colony
Ganymede Colony.description: Place a city tile ON THE RESERVED AREA.

GHG Factories.name: GHG Factories
GHG Factories.description: Decrease your energy production 1 step and increase your heat production 4 steps.
GHG Factories.description_ru: Снизьте своё производство энергии на 1 и повысьте своё производство тепла на 4.

Giant Ice Asteroid.name: Giant Ice Asteroid
Giant Ice Asteroid.description: Raise temperature 2 steps and place 2 ocean tiles. Remove up to 6 plants from any player.
Giant Ice Asteroid.description_ru: Повысьте температуру на 2 и выложите 2 тайла океана. Удалите до 6 растений у любого игрока.

Grass.name: Grass
Grass.description: Requires -16° C or warmer. Increase your plant production 1 step. Gain 3 plants.
Grass.description_ru: Температура должна быть -16 градусов или выше. Повысьте своё производство растений на 1 и получите 3 растения.

Great Dam.name: Great Dam
Great Dam.description: Requires 4 ocean tiles. Increase your energy production 2 steps.
Great Dam.description_ru: Необходимо 4 тайла океана. Повысьте своё производство энергии на 2.

Greenhouses.name: Greenhouses
Greenhouses.description: Gain 1 plant for each city tile in play.
Greenhouses.description_ru: Получите 1 растение за каждый построенный город в игре.

Heather.name: Heather
Heather.description: Requires -14 C° or warmer. Increase your plant production 1 step. Gain 1 plant.
Heather.description_ru: Температура должна быть -14 градусов или выше. Повысьте своё производство растений на 1 и получите 1 растение.

Heat Trappers.name: Heat Trappers
Heat Trappers.description: Decrease any heat production 2 steps and increase your energy production 1 step.
Heat Trappers.description_ru: Снизьте производство тепла у любого игрока на 2 и повысьте своё производство энергии на 1.

description.text: Requires 8% oxygen. +1 animal to this card. -1 any plant production

Ice Cap Melting.name: Ice Cap Melting
Ice Cap Melting.description: Requires +2 C or warmer. Place 1 ocean tile.
Ice Cap Melting.description_ru: Температура должна быть +2 или выше. Выложите 1 тайл океана.

Immigrant City.name: Immigrant City
Immigrant City.description: Decrease your energy production 1 step and decrease your M€ production 2 steps. Place a city tile.
Immigrant City.description_ru: Снизьте ваше производство энергии на 1, а доход – на 2. Постройте город.

Imported GHG.name: Imported GHG
Imported GHG.description: Increase your heat production 1 step and gain 3 heat.
Imported GHG.description_ru: Повысьте своё производство тепла на 1 и получите 3 тепла.

Imported Hydrogen.name: Imported Hydrogen
Imported Hydrogen.description: Gain 3 plants, or add 3 microbes or 2 animals to ANOTHER card. Place an ocean tile.
Imported Hydrogen.description_ru: Получите 3 растения или же положите 3 жетона бактерий или 2 жетона животных на другую карту. Выложите тайл океана.

Imported Nitrogen.name: Imported Nitrogen
Imported Nitrogen.description: Raise your TR 1 step and gain 4 plants. Add 3 microbes to ANOTHER card and 2 animals to ANOTHER card.
Imported Nitrogen.description_ru: Повысьте свой рейтинг на 1 и получите 4 растения. Добавьте 3 жетона бактерий на другую карту и 2 жетона животных на другую карту.

Industrial Microbes.name: Industrial Microbes
Industrial Microbes.description: Increase your energy production and your steel production 1 step each.
Industrial Microbes.description_ru: Повысьте своё производство энергии и производство стали на 1.

Insects.name: Insects
Insects.description: Requires 6% oxygen. Increase your plant production 1 step for each plant tag you have.
Insects.description_ru: Уровень кислорода должен быть 6%. Повысьте своё производство растений на 1 за каждый ваш символ растений.

Insulation.name: Insulation
Insulation.description: Decrease your heat production any number of steps and increase your M€ production the same number of steps.
Insulation.description_ru: Снизьте своё производство тепла на любое число и на столько же повысьте свой доход.

Ironworks.name: Ironworks
Ironworks.description: Action: Spend 4 energy to gain 1 steel and raise oxygen 1 step.
Ironworks.description_ru: Действие: потратьте 4 энергии, чтобы получить 1 сталь и повысить уровень кислорода на 1.

Kelp Farming.name: Kelp Farming
Kelp Farming.description: Requires 6 ocean tiles. Increase your M€ production 2 steps and your plant production 3 steps. Gain 2 plants.
Kelp Farming.description_ru: Необходимо 6 тайлов океана. Получите 2 растения, повысьте своё производство растений на 3, а свой доход на 2.

Lake Marineris.name: Lake Marineris
Lake Marineris.description: Requires 0° C or warmer. Place 2 ocean tiles.
Lake Marineris.description_ru: Температура должна быть 0°C или выше. Выложите 2 тайла океана.

Large Convoy.name: Large Convoy
Large Convoy.description: Place an ocean tile and draw 2 cards. Gain 5 plants or add 4 animals to ANOTHER card.
Large Convoy.description_ru: Выложите тайл океана и возьмите 2 карты. Получите 5 растений или положите 4 жетона животных на другую карту.

Lava Flows.name: Lava Flows
Lava Flows.description: Raise temperature 2 steps and place this tile ON EITHER THARSIS THOLUS, ASCRAEUS MONS, PAVONIS MONS OR ARSIA MONS.
Lava Flows.description_ru: Повысьте температуру на 2 и выложите этот тайл либо на купол Фарсида, либо на гору Павлина, либо на гору Арсия.

Lichen.name: Lichen
Lichen.description: Requires -24 C or warmer. Increase your plant production 1 step.
Lichen.description_ru: Температура должна быть -24 или выше. Повысьте своё производство растений на 1.

description.text: Requires 9% oxygen. Decrease your plant production 1 step and increase your M€ production 2 steps

Local Heat Trapping.name: Local Heat Trapping
Local Heat Trapping.description: Spend 5 heat to gain either 4 plants, or to add 2 animals to ANOTHER card.
Local Heat Trapping.description_ru: Потратьте 5 тепла и получите 4 растения или положите 2 жетона животных на другую карту.

Lunar Beam.name: Lunar Beam
Lunar Beam.description: Decrease your M€ production 2 steps and increase your heat production and energy production 2 steps each.
Lunar Beam.description_ru: Снизьте свой доход на 2 и повысьте своё производство тепла и производство энергии на 2.

Magnetic Field Dome.name: Magnetic Field Dome
Magnetic Field Dome.description: Decrease your energy production 2 steps and increase your plant production 1 step. Raise your TR 1 step.
Magnetic Field Dome.description_ru: Снизьте своё производство энергии на 2 и повысьте своё производство растений на 1. Повысьте свой рейтинг на 1.

Magnetic Field Generators.name: Magnetic Field Generators
Magnetic Field Generators.description: Decrease your energy production 4 steps and increase your plant production 2 steps. Raise your TR 3 steps.
Magnetic Field Generators.description_ru: Снизьте своё производство энергии на 4 и повысьте своё производство растений на 2. Повысьте свой рейтинг на 3.

Mangrove.name: Mangrove
Mangrove.description: Requires +4 C or warmer. Place a greenery tile ON AN AREA RESERVED FOR OCEAN and raise oxygen 1 step. Disregard normal placement restrictions for this.
Mangrove.description_ru: Температура должна быть +4 градуса или выше. Проведите озеленение на зарезервированном для океана участке, игнорируя правила проведения озеленения, и повысьте уровень кислорода на 1.

Martian Rails.name: Martian Rails
Martian Rails.description: megacredits Action: Spend 1 energy to gain 1 M€ for each city tile ON MARS.

Methane From Titan.name: Methane From Titan
Methane From Titan.description: Requires 2% oxygen. Increase your heat production 2 steps and your plant production 2 steps.
Methane From Titan.description_ru: Уровень кислорода должен быть 2%. Повысьте своё производство тепла на 2 и производство растений на 2.

Mining Expedition.name: Mining Expedition
Mining Expedition.description: Raise oxygen 1 step. Remove 2 plants from any player. Gain 2 steel.
Mining Expedition.description_ru: Повысьте уровень кислорода на 1. Удалите 2 растения у любого игрока, получите 2 стали.

Mining Rights.name: Mining Rights
Mining Rights.description: Place this tile on an area with a steel or titanium placement bonus. Increase that production 1 step.
Mining Rights.description_ru: Выложите этот тайл на участок, где титан или сталь являются бонусом за размещение тайла. Повысьте производство стали или титана на 1.

Mohole Area.name: Mohole Area
Mohole Area.description: Increase your heat production 4 steps. Place this tile ON AN AREA RESERVED FOR OCEAN.
Mohole Area.description_ru: Повысьте своё производство тепла на 4. Выложите этот тайл на зарезервированный для океана участок.

Moss.name: Moss
Moss.description: Requires 3 ocean tiles and that you lose 1 plant. Increase your plant production 1 step.
Moss.description_ru: Необходимо 3 тайла океана и потерять 1 растение. Повысьте своё производство растений на 1.

Natural Preserve.name: Natural Preserve
Natural Preserve.description: Oxygen must be 4% or less. Place this tile NEXT TO NO OTHER TILE. Increase your M€ production 1 step.
Natural Preserve.description_ru: Уровень кислорода должен быть 4% или ниже. Выложите этот тайл так, чтобы он не был соседним ни с каким другим тайлом. Повысьте свой доход на 1.

Nitrite Reducing Bacteria.name: Nitrite Reducing Bacteria
Nitrite Reducing Bacteria.description_ru: Положите 3 жетона бактерий на эту карту.

Nitrogen-Rich Asteroid.name: Nitrogen-Rich Asteroid
Nitrogen-Rich Asteroid.description: Raise your terraforming rating 2 steps and temperature 1 step. Increase your plant production 1 step, or 4 steps if you have 3 plant tags.
Nitrogen-Rich Asteroid.description_ru: Повысьте свой рейтинг на 2 и температуру на 1. Повысьте своё производство растений на 1 или, если у вас есть 3 символа растений, на 4.

Nitrophilic Moss.name: Nitrophilic Moss
Nitrophilic Moss.description: Requires 3 ocean tiles and that you lose 2 plants. Increase your plant production 2 steps.
Nitrophilic Moss.description_ru: Необходимо 3 тайла океана и потерять 2 растения. Повысьте своё производство растений на 2.

Noctis City.name: Noctis City
Noctis City.description: Decrease your energy production 1 step and increase your M€ production 3 steps. Place a city tile ON THE RESERVED AREA, disregarding normal placement restrictions.
Noctis City.description_ru: Снизьте своё производство энергии на 1 и повысьте свой доход на 3. Постройте город на зарезервированном участке, независимо от стандартных требований к строительству города.

Noctis Farming.name: Noctis Farming
Noctis Farming.description: Requires -20 C or warmer. Increase your M€ production 1 step and gain 2 plants.
Noctis Farming.description_ru: Температура должна быть -20 или выше. Повысьте свой доход на 1 и получите 2 растения.

Nuclear Power.name: Nuclear Power
Nuclear Power.description: Decrease your M€ production 2 steps and increase your energy production 3 steps.
Nuclear Power.description_ru: Снизьте свой доход на 2 и повысьте своё производство энергии на 3.

Nuclear Zone.name: Nuclear Zone
Nuclear Zone.description: Place this tile and raise temperature 2 steps.
Nuclear Zone.description_ru: Выложите этот тайл и повысьте температуру на 2.

description.text: Requires 12% oxygen. Gain 2 plants. Place a city tile. Decrease your energy production 1 step and increase your M€ production 4 steps.

Optimal Aerobraking.name: Optimal Aerobraking
Optimal Aerobraking.description: megacredits Effect: When you play a space event, you gain 3 M€ and 3 heat.

Ore Processor.name: Ore Processor
Ore Processor.description: Action: Spend 4 energy to gain 1 titanium and increase oxygen 1 step.
Ore Processor.description_ru: Действие: потратьте 4 энергии, чтобы получить 1 титан и повысить уровень кислорода на 1.

Permafrost Extraction.name: Permafrost Extraction
Permafrost Extraction.description: Requires -8 C or warmer. Place 1 ocean tile.
Permafrost Extraction.description_ru: Температура должна быть -8 или выше. Выложите 1 тайл океана.

Peroxide Power.name: Peroxide Power
Peroxide Power.description: Decrease your M€ production 1 step and increase your energy production 2 steps.
Peroxide Power.description_ru: Снизьте свой доход на 1 и повысьте своё производство энергии на 2.

description.text: Add 1 animal to this card.

Phobos Space Haven.name: Phobos Space Haven
Phobos Space Haven.description: Increase your titanium production 1 step and place a city tile ON THE RESERVED AREA.
Phobos Space Haven.description_ru: Повысьте своё производство титана на 1. Постройте город на зарезервированном участке.

Plantation.name: Plantation
Plantation.description: Requires 2 science tags. Place a greenery tile and raise oxygen 1 step.
Plantation.description_ru: Необходимо 2 символа науки. Проведите озеленение и повысьте уровень кислорода на 1.

Power Grid.name: Power Grid
Power Grid.description: Increase your energy production step for each power tag you have, including this.
Power Grid.description_ru: Повысьте своё производство энергии на 1 за каждый ваш символ энергии, включая этот.

Power Plant.name: Power Plant
Power Plant.description: Increase your heat production 2 steps and your energy production 1 step.

Protected Valley.name: Protected Valley
Protected Valley.description: Increase your M€ production 2 steps. Place a greenery tile ON AN AREA RESERVED FOR OCEAN, disregarding normal placement restrictions, and increase oxygen 1 step.
Protected Valley.description_ru: Повысьте свой доход на 2. Проведите озеленение зарезервированного для океана участка, игнорируя правила проведения озеленений, и повысьте уровень кислорода на 1.

Rad-Chem Factory.name: Rad-Chem Factory
Rad-Chem Factory.description: Decrease your energy production 1 step. Raise your TR 2 steps.
Rad-Chem Factory.description_ru: Снизьте своё производство энергии на 1. Повысьте свой рейтинг на 2.

Regolith Eaters.name: Regolith Eaters
Regolith Eaters.description: Action: Add 1 microbe to this card. Action: Remove 2 microbes from this card to raise oxygen level 1 step.

Research Outpost.name: Research Outpost

Botanical Experience.description: Requires one greenery tile on Mars.

Breeding Farms.name: Breeding Farms
Breeding Farms.description: Requires 1 science tag and 1 animal tag. Raise the temperature 1 step. | Spend 1 plant to add 1 animal to ANY card.

Cassini Station.name: Cassini Station
Cassini Station.description: Increase your energy production 1 step for every colony in play.

Ceres Spaceport.name: Ceres Spaceport
Ceres Spaceport.description: Increase your M€ production 2 steps, and titanium production 1 step for every 2 Jovian tags (including these.)

Charity Donation.name: Charity Donation
Charity Donation.description: Reveal cards from the deck equal to the player count plus 1. In player order starting with you, each player takes one card in hand. Discard the remaining card. 1 VP.

Chimera.name: Chimera
Chimera.description: You start with 36 M€, 1 steel, and 1 titanium. Effect: When you perform an action, these 2 wild tags count as any tags of your choice. For claiming milestones and funding awards, both symbols count as one.

Collegium Copernicus.name: Collegium Copernicus
Collegium Copernicus.description: You start with 33 M€. As your first action, draw 2 cards with a science tag. Effect: When you play a card with a science tag (including this) add 1 data to any card. Action: Spend 3 data from this card to trade.

Communication Center.name: Communication Center
Communication Center.description: Decrease your energy production 1 step. Place 2 data on this card.

Controlled Bloom.name: Controlled Bloom
Controlled Bloom.description: Requires 3 oceans. Add 3 microbes to ANY card. Gain 3 plants.

Coordinated Raid.name: Coordinated Raid
Coordinated Raid.description: Requires at least 1 colony in play. Send one of your unused Trade Fleets to ANY colony tile (can be a tile already used this generation.) | Requires at least 1 colony in play. Send one of your unused Trade Fleets to any colony tile.

Crashlanding.name: Crashlanding
Crashlanding.description: Place and orient the Crashlanding tile on a non-reserved space adjacent to no more than 1 city. Crashsite grants an adjacency bonus of 1 data, and either 1 steel or 1 titanium. When placing, for each tile you own next to it, gain those bonuses. Add 1 data to any card. Add 1 resource to any card.

Crew Training.name: Crew Training
Crew Training.description: Choose a planet tag. This card counts as having 2 of that tag.

Cryptocurrency.name: Cryptocurrency
Cryptocurrency.description: Spend 1 energy to add 1 data to this card. | Remove all data from this card to gain 3M€ per data removed.

Cultivation of Venus.name: Cultivation of Venus
Cultivation of Venus.description: 1 VP for every 2 Venus tags you own. | Spend 3 plants to raise Venus 1 step.

Cyanobacteria.name: Cyanobacteria
Cyanobacteria.description: Raise the oxygen level 1%. For every ocean tile, add a microbe to ANY card.

Declaration of Independence.name: Declaration of Independence
Declaration of Independence.description: Requires that you have at least 6 Mars tags in play. Place 2 delegates in any party.

Deep Space Operations.name: Deep Space Operations
Deep Space Operations.description: Gain 4 titanium. Draw 2 event cards with a space tag.

Design Company.name: Design Company
Design Company.description: Increase your steel production 1 step. Draw 3 cards with a building tag.

Designed Organisms.name: Designed Organisms
Designed Organisms.description: Requires 5 science tags. Increase your plant production 2 steps. Gain 3 plants.

Dust Storm.name: Dust Storm
Dust Storm.description: Every player loses all energy. Raise the temperature 2 steps.

Dyson Screens.name: Dyson Screens
Dyson Screens.description: Raise the temperature 1 step. Draw a card. Place a city tile ON THE RESERVED AREA. Raise your energy and heat production 2 steps. | Pay 2 titanium to raise your heat and energy production 1 step each.

Early Expedition.name: Early Expedition
Early Expedition.description: Temperature must be -18 C or lower. Decrease your energy production 1 step and

Economic Espionage.name: Economic Espionage
Economic Espionage.description: Spend 2 M€ to Add 1 data to ANY card.

Economic Help.name: Economic Help
Economic Help.description: Raise the lowest non-completed planetary influence track 3 steps. When tied, raise all lowest tracks 2 steps.

Expedition to the Surface - Venus.name: Expedition to the Surface - Venus
Expedition to the Surface - Venus.description: Draw 2 cards. Raise Venus 1 step. Gain 1M€ for each of your Venus tags, including this.

Experienced Martians.name: Experienced Martians
Experienced Martians.description: Place 1 delegate in any party. Draw 2 cards with a Mars tag. Increase your M€ production 2 steps.

Flat Mars Theory.name: Flat Mars Theory
Flat Mars Theory.description: Requires maximum 1 science tag. Increase your M€ production 1 step for every generation played so far.

Floater-Urbanism.name: Floater-Urbanism
Floater-Urbanism.description: Requires 4 Venus tags. | Spend 1 floater from any card to add 1 Venusian habitat on this card.

Gagarin Mobile Base.name: Gagarin Mobile Base
Gagarin Mobile Base.description: You start with 42 M€. As your first action, put Gagarin Mobile Base on any area on Mars. Collect the bonus. Action: Move the Base to any nearest empty area where it has not yet been. Collect the bonus. Effect: When another player places a tile where the Base is, move the Base.

Geological Expedition.name: Geological Expedition
Geological Expedition.description: When you place a tile ON MARS gain 1 additional resource on the space. If the space has no bonus, gain 1 steel.

Habitat Marte.name: Habitat Marte
Habitat Marte.description: You start with 40 M€. Effect: Mars tags also count as science tags.

High Temp. Superconductors.name: High Temp. Superconductors
High Temp. Superconductors.description: Requires Kelvinists are ruling or you have 2 delegates there. Increase your energy production 2 steps. | When playing a power card, THE STANDARD PROJECT POWER PLANT, OR THE KELVINIST RULING POLICY ACTION, pay 3M€ less.

Huygens Observatory.name: Huygens Observatory
Huygens Observatory.description: Place a colony. MAY BE PLACED ON A COLONY TILE WHERE YOU ALREADY HAVE A COLONY.

Hydrogen Bombardment.name: Hydrogen Bombardment
Hydrogen Bombardment.description: Increase the Venus scale 1 step. Increase your titanium production 1 step. Gain 6 M€.

Hydrogen Processing Plant.name: Hydrogen Processing Plant
Hydrogen Processing Plant.description: Oxygen level must be 3% or higher. Decrease oxygen level 1%

Interplanetary Transport.name: Interplanetary Transport
Interplanetary Transport.description: Increase your M€ production 1 step for every offworld city tile.

Kickstarter.name: Kickstarter
Kickstarter.description: Choose a planet tag. This card counts as having 1 of that tag. Raise the corresponding planetary track 3 steps in total.

Last Resort Ingenuity.name: Last Resort Ingenuity
Last Resort Ingenuity.description: The next card you play this generation can be paid for with steel or titanium despite its tags.

Lobby Halls.name: Lobby Halls
Lobby Halls.description: Increase your M€ production 2 steps. Place 1 delegate in any party.

Lunar Embassy.name: Lunar Embassy
Lunar Embassy.description: Increase your M€ production 3 steps, and plant production 1 step for every 2 Earth tags (including this.)

Luxury Estate.name: Luxury Estate
Luxury Estate.description: Oxygen must be 7% or greater. Gain 1 titanium for each city tile and greenery tile you own.

Mars Direct.name: Mars Direct
Mars Direct.description: You start with 52 M€. Effect: When you play a Mars tag, you pay 1 M€ less for each Mars tag you have.

Mars Maths.name: Mars Maths
Mars Maths.description: You start with 40 M€. As your first action, draw 2 cards. Effect: At the beginning of the Research phase, you draw 5 cards, but may still only buy 4 cards. If you are drafting, keep 2 cards for your first draft. Action: Take another two actions this turn.

Martian Culture.name: Martian Culture
Martian Culture.description: Requires ANY 2 Mars tags in play.  1 VP for every 2 data here. | Add 1 data to ANY card.

Martian Dust Processing Plant.name: Martian Dust Processing Plant
Martian Dust Processing Plant.description: Decrease your energy production 1 step, and raise your steel production 2 steps. Gain 1 TR.

Martian Insurance Group.name: Martian Insurance Group
Martian Insurance Group.description: You start with 42 M€ and 1 M€ production. Effect: Whenever you play an event card, raise your M€ production 1 step.

Martian Monuments.name: Martian Monuments
Martian Monuments.description: Requires that you own a city ON MARS. Raise your M€ production 1 step for every Mars tag you own (including this.)

Martian Nature Wonders.name: Martian Nature Wonders
Martian Nature Wonders.description: Place a neutral player cube on a non-reserved space. No tile can be placed on that space this game.

Martian Repository.name: Martian Repository
Martian Repository.description: Decrease your energy production 1 step. 1 VP for every 3 data here. | For every science or Mars tag you play (including these) add 1 data to this card.

Microbiology Patents.name: Microbiology Patents
Microbiology Patents.description: After you play a card with a microbe tag, increase your M€ production 1 step.

Mind Set Mars.name: Mind Set Mars
Mind Set Mars.description: You start with 44 M€ and 1 agenda resource on this card. Effect: When you play a card with a building tag, add 1 agenda on this card. Action: Spend 2 agenda resources to place 1 delegate in any party. Action: Spend 5 agenda resources to place a city tile on Mars.

Museum of Early Colonisation.name: Museum of Early Colonisation
Museum of Early Colonisation.description: Requires 1 ocean, 1 city and one greenery on Mars.

New Venice.name: New Venice
New Venice.description: Requires 3 ocean tiles. Lose 2 plants. Increase your energy production 1 step and your M€ production 2 steps.

Nobel Labs.name: Nobel Labs
Nobel Labs.description: Requires 4 science tags. | Add 2 microbes OR 2 data OR 2 floaters to ANY card.

Odyssey.name: Odyssey
Odyssey.description: You start with 33 M€. Effect: Your event cards stay face up, and their tags are in use as if those were automated (green) cards. Action: Pay for and play an event card you have already played that has a base cost of 16 M€ or less, after which discard that card.

Orbital Laboratories.name: Orbital Laboratories
Orbital Laboratories.description: Increase your plant production 2 steps. Gain 1 plant.

Oumuamua Type Object Survey.name: Oumuamua Type Object Survey
Oumuamua Type Object Survey.description: Requires 1 space tag and 1 science tag. Add 2 data to ANY card.

Ozone Generators.name: Ozone Generators
Ozone Generators.description: Requires 6% Oxygen. | Spend 3 energy to gain 1 TR.

Personal Agenda.name: Personal Agenda
Personal Agenda.description: Increase your M€ production 3 steps. Draw 3 event cards that do not have a space tag.

Polaris.name: Polaris
Polaris.description: You start with 32 M€. As your first action, place an ocean tile. Effect: When any ocean tile is placed on Mars, increase your M€ production 1 step. When you place an ocean tile, gain 4 M€.

Pollinators.name: Pollinators
Pollinators.description: Requires 3 plant tags. Raise your plant production 1 step and your M€ production 2 steps. | Add 1 animal on this card

Prefabrication of Human Habitats.name: Prefabrication of Human Habitats
Prefabrication of Human Habitats.description: Requires that you have steel production. | Cards with a city tag cost 2M€ less. | The CITY STANDARD PROJECT costs 2M€ less. STEEL MAY BE USED as if you were playing a building card.

Private Security.name: Private Security
Private Security.description: Opponents may not remove your basic resource production.

Public Sponsored Grant.name: Public Sponsored Grant
Public Sponsored Grant.description: Requires Scientists are ruling or that you have 2 delegates there. All players lose 2M€. Choose a tag (NOT CITY, ? OR PLANETARY TRACK) and draw 2 cards with that tag.

Rare-Earth Elements.name: Rare-Earth Elements
Rare-Earth Elements.description: Increase your M€ production by 1 for every special tile you own on Mars.

Red City.name: Red City
Red City.description: Requires that Reds are ruling or that you have 2 delegates there.

Research Grant.name: Research Grant
Research Grant.description: Increase your energy production 1 step. Gain 14 M€.

Return to Abandoned Technology.name: Return to Abandoned Technology
Return to Abandoned Technology.description: Draw the top 4 cards from the discard pile. Choose 2 to keep and discard the rest.

Rich Deposits.name: Rich Deposits
Rich Deposits.description: Requires 2 science tags. Increase your steel production 3 steps.

Ringcom.name: Ringcom
Ringcom.description: You start with 39 M€ and 3 M€ production. As your first action, draw 2 cards with a Jovian tag. Effect: When any player plays a card with a Jovian tag (including this) gain 1 titanium.

Robin Haulings.name: Robin Haulings
Robin Haulings.description: You start with 39 M€. Effect: Whenever you play a card with a Venus tag add 1 floater to any card. Action: Remove 3 floaters from this card to raise Venus 1 step or raise oxygen 1 step.

Secret Labs.name: Secret Labs
Secret Labs.description: Requires 1 science tag and 1 Jovian tag.

Small Comet.name: Small Comet
Small Comet.description: Every player loses 2 plants. Raise the temperature 1 step. Raise the oxygen 1 step.

Small Open Pit Mine.name: Small Open Pit Mine
Small Open Pit Mine.description: Increase your steel production 2 steps OR increase your titanium production 1 step.

Social Events.name: Social Events
Social Events.description: Gain 1 TR for every 2 Mars tags you have (including this one.)

Soil Detoxification.name: Soil Detoxification
Soil Detoxification.description: Requires that Greens are ruling or you have 2 delegates there. Increase your plant production 1 step | Using the STANDARD GREENERY ACTION costs 1 plant less.

Solarpedia.name: Solarpedia
Solarpedia.description: Requires 1 Venus, Earth, Mars, and Jovian Tag. Add 2 data to ANY card. 1 VP for every 6 data resources here. | Add 2 data to ANY card.
Solarpedia.requirements: 1 Venus tag, 1 Earth tag, 1 Mars tag, 1 Jovian tag

Solar Storm.name: Solar Storm
Solar Storm.description: Every player loses 2 plants. Remove up to 3 data from any player.

SolBank.name: SolBank
SolBank.description: You start with 40 M€. Effect: Whenever you spend M€ (or steel or titanium) add 1 data to this card. During the production phase convert each data from this card into 1 M€ each.

Soylent Seedling Systems.name: Soylent Seedling Systems
Soylent Seedling Systems.description: You start with 38 M€ and 2 seeds on this card. Effect: When you place a greenery tile, add 1 seed resource to this card. Effect: When paying for a plant card, or the standard greenery project, seeds here may be used as 5 M€ each.

Space Debris Cleaning Operation.name: Space Debris Cleaning Operation
Space Debris Cleaning Operation.description: Requires any 4 space tags in play. Gain 3 titanium.

Space Relay.name: Space Relay
Space Relay.description: Increase your M€ production 1 step. | Whenever you play a card with a Jovian tag, including this, draw a card.

Specialized Settlement.name: Specialized Settlement
Specialized Settlement.description: Decrease your energy production 1 step and increase your M€ production 3 steps.

Steelaris.name: Steelaris
Steelaris.description: You start with 42 M€. Effect: When any city or special tile is placed on Mars, gain 1 steel and 1 plant.

Survey Mission.name: Survey Mission
Survey Mission.description: Gain 5 steel. Land-claim three non-reserved spaces in a triangle shape. Gain all placement bonuses.

Terraforming Control Station.name: Terraforming Control Station
Terraforming Control Station.description: Raise your TR 2 steps. | When you play a Venus or Mars tag, pay 2 M€ less.

Terraforming Robots.name: Terraforming Robots
Terraforming Robots.description: Requires 4 science tags. | When you play a Mars tag, add 1 specialized robot on this card.

The New Space Race.name: The New Space Race
The New Space Race.description: REVEALED BEFORE ANY OTHER PRELUDE. You become starting player for the game. Choose and set a ruling policy for the first generation. Gain 12 M€.

Think Tank.name: Think Tank
Think Tank.description: Spend 2 M€ to place 1 data on any card. | When playing a card, you can remove data from this card to

Valuable Gases.name: Valuable Gases
Valuable Gases.description: Gain 10 M€. PLAY AN ACTIVE FLOATER CARD FROM HAND, IGNORING GLOBAL REQUIREMENTS, and add 5 floaters to it.

Venera Base.name: Venera Base
Venera Base.description: Requires Unity is ruling or that you have 2 delegates there. Raise your M€ production 3 steps and place a city tile ON THE RESERVED AREA. | Add 1 floater to ANY Venus card

Venus First.name: Venus First
Venus First.description: Raise Venus 2 steps. Draw 2 Venus cards.

Vital Colony.name: Vital Colony
Vital Colony.description: Place a colony. Receive the placement bonus twice.

Wetlands.name: Wetlands
Wetlands.description: Requires 2 ocean tiles. Lose 4 plants. Place Wetlands tile on an unreserved space adjacent to at least 2 oceans. Raise oxygen 1 step. Gain 1 TR. Wetlands counts as a greenery tile and an ocean tile, except it cannot be covered and is not one of the 9 oceans required to end the game. 1 VP.

Curiosity II.name: Curiosity II
Curiosity II.description: Start with 40 MC, 2 steel production. When you place a tile on an area with a placement bonus, you may pay 2 MC to draw a card.

Playwrights.name: Playwrights
Playwrights.description: Start with 38 MC, 1 energy production. Action: Replay a played event from any player by paying its cost.

Midas.name: Midas
Midas.description: Start with 120 MC and -7 TR. You start the game with only 7 TR instead of 20 TR.

CO² Reducers.name: CO² Reducers
CO² Reducers.description: Increase your MC production 3 steps. Draw 2 microbe cards from the deck.

Project Workshop.name: Project Workshop
Project Workshop.description: Action: flip a played blue card face down to gain 3 MC, 1 TR, and draw a card.

Trade Advance.name: Trade Advance
Trade Advance.description: Trade without spending a trade fleet.

Agricola Inc.name: Agricola Inc
Agricola Inc.description: Start with 40 MC, 1 plant production, 1 MC production, 1 heat production. End game: score VP based on tag diversity.

Athena.name: Athena
Athena.description: Start with 45 MC, Science tag. Effect: when a global parameter is raised, other players cannot play cards with requirements on that parameter this generation.

Eris.name: Eris
Eris.description: Start with 42 MC. Attack-focused corporation with bonuses for harming opponents.

Incite.name: Incite
Incite.description: Start with 32 MC, 5 MC production. When you play an event, gain 2 delegates. Sending delegates costs 2 MC less.

Junk Ventures.name: Junk Ventures
Junk Ventures.description: Start with 40 MC. Action: draw a card from the discard pile by paying 3 MC.

United Nations Mission One.name: United Nations Mission One
United Nations Mission One.description: Start with 43 MC. Gain 1 TR and 1 delegate.

Archimedes Hydroponics Station.name: Archimedes Hydroponics Station
Archimedes Hydroponics Station.description: Action: spend 1 energy to gain 1 plant. Building + Plant + Science tags.

Luna Trade Federation.name: Luna Trade Federation
Luna Trade Federation.description: Colony trade bonus. Earth + Jovian tags.

Nanotech Industries.name: Nanotech Industries
Nanotech Industries.description: When you play a Science tag, draw a card. 1 VP per 2 Science tags.
